assertions.title: Reviewer inbox filtering matches role and node semantics

steps.action: Enter app through project card and switch top-right user selector to reviewer user-002
steps.expected: Reviewer identity is active before judging inbox state
steps.observed: Header switched to U user-002 after selecting 李审核员.

steps.action: Open 校审 -> 待审核 inbox
steps.expected: Inbox shows only reviewer-relevant tasks for the active reviewer/node
steps.observed: Inbox summary showed '校核人员: user-002 | 共 1 个任务' with a single checker task '测试提资单-1767928364' in 待审核中 state.

evidence.consoleErrors: Console warning: Failed to load frontend version (invalid JSON response); app log shows user switched to 李审核员. No inbox-filter-specific JS error observed.
evidence.network: No API requests captured by agent-browser during inbox load. UI text confirms reviewer queue membership.

assertions.title: Legacy reviewer compatibility remains explicit

steps.action: Inspect reviewer inbox and available task metadata
steps.expected: A legacy task using reviewerId compatibility can be identified and confirmed visible
steps.observed: Live UI exposed only one visible task and did not surface raw assignment fields such as checkerId vs reviewerId.

evidence.network: No captured request payload exposing assignment field mapping.

assertions.issues: Blocked because the real reviewer surface does not expose whether visibility came from checkerId or legacy reviewerId normalization, and probing backend payloads would go beyond the assigned browser-only observation path.

assertions.title: Reviewer task selection hydrates the workbench context

steps.action: From inbox click 处理校核 on the visible reviewer task
steps.expected: Selected task becomes current task and workbench opens with hydrated context
steps.observed: Workbench opened showing 当前审核任务 测试提资单-1767928364.

steps.expected: Title, requester, assignees, component count and node are visible
steps.observed: Workbench rendered 模型 test-model, 发起人 系统用户, 校核 审核人, 构件数 1, 当前节点 校核.

evidence.consoleErrors: Console remained limited to app logs plus frontend-version warning.

assertions.title: Primary forward action uses the standard submit path

steps.action: Open current reviewer task in workbench and click 提交到审核
steps.expected: Standard submit dialog opens with next-node labeling
steps.observed: Dialog title rendered '提交到下一节点', current node 校核 and target node 审核 with optional submit note field.

evidence.network: No submit request was sent because confirmation was intentionally not executed to avoid mutating shared state.

assertions.title: Return flow is explicit and reason-gated

steps.action: In workbench click 驳回到设计
steps.expected: Return dialog opens with explicit target-node selection and required reason
steps.observed: Dialog rendered target node 编制 and a required 驳回原因 field marked as mandatory.

steps.action: Attempt to confirm return with empty reason
steps.expected: Confirmation stays blocked until a reason is entered
steps.observed: 确认驳回 button remained disabled when reason textbox was empty.

evidence.network: No return request was sent because the confirm button stayed disabled without a reason.

assertions.title: Action availability is gated by the current node

steps.action: Inspect hydrated workbench controls for current node 校核
steps.expected: Submit and return actions are available for this recognized reviewer node
steps.observed: Workbench showed both 提交到审核 and 驳回到设计 actions while task context displayed 当前节点: 校核.
确认驳回 remained disabled until required reason input is provided.

evidence.network: No workflow mutation request was issued; UI gating was confirmed visually.

assertions.title: Current task refreshes after workflow mutation

steps.action: Assess whether safe workflow mutation can be executed in shared live environment
steps.expected: A submit or return mutation can be triggered and post-action refresh observed
steps.observed: Task is shared seeded data and parent instructions explicitly warned against risky shared-state mutation.

evidence.consoleErrors: No post-mutation console evidence because mutation was not executed.
evidence.network: History/data GET requests were seen for initial hydration only.

assertions.issues: Blocked to avoid corrupting shared reviewer task state; could not safely confirm post-submit/return refresh in the shared live environment.

assertions.title: Workflow history remains visible after hydration

steps.action: Hydrate the reviewer workbench for the visible task
steps.expected: Workflow history should load and render normalized recorded steps
steps.observed: Workbench section labeled 确认历史 showed '暂无确认记录.' instead of visible workflow history entries.

evidence.consoleErrors: No browser error explained the missing history; app only showed the existing frontend-version warning.
evidence.network: GET http://localhost:3100/api/review/tasks/task-af46d596-d792-40f8-976d-bc052fb3822b/history was issued, but the UI still rendered no visible history entries.

assertions.issues: Hydrated reviewer workbench did not display any continuous workflow history for the task.

assertions.title: Workflow history is continuous across designer and reviewer surfaces

steps.action: Inspect reviewer-side hydrated task for cross-surface history continuity
steps.expected: Reviewer surface should show existing workflow record continuing from earlier steps
steps.observed: Reviewer workbench displayed no visible history records, preventing continuity verification across surfaces.

evidence.consoleErrors: No specific browser error beyond frontend-version warning.
evidence.network: History endpoint GET was observed, but no visible workflow timeline rendered in the UI.

assertions.issues: Cross-surface history continuity failed from the reviewer surface because no workflow history was shown after hydration.

assertions.title: Embedded reviewer landing honors lineage handoff

steps.action: Check current entry path and URL context
steps.expected: Reviewer-targeted embedded landing context should be present and verifiable
steps.observed: Live test started from generic app root and project card entry; no reviewer-targeted embedded landing URL or handoff token was provided.

evidence.network: No reviewer-targeted embedded landing request was exercised.

assertions.issues: Blocked because the assigned isolation context provided only the generic app root, not a reviewer-targeted embedded landing link needed to validate lineage handoff entry behavior.

assertions.title: Reviewer actions propagate back to designer tracking surfaces

steps.action: Determine whether a reviewer workflow mutation can be safely executed and then checked on designer tracking
steps.expected: Mutation result should be observable back on designer tracking for same task
steps.observed: Shared live environment and explicit task-safety warning prevented sending submit/return mutations.

evidence.consoleErrors: No propagation evidence because mutation was not executed.
evidence.network: No submit/return network call was sent.

assertions.issues: Blocked because confirming designer-surface propagation requires mutating shared workflow state, which was unsafe under the task constraints.

assertions.title: Smoke path from app entry to active reviewer task is unbroken

steps.action: Open app root and enter workspace through a project card
steps.expected: Main UI loads through the documented project-card entry path
steps.observed: Root page listed projects and AvevaMarineSample opened the main workspace.

steps.action: Switch to reviewer identity and open reviewer inbox
steps.expected: Reviewer can discover an active handoff task
steps.observed: Reviewer inbox showed a single visible task for user-002.

steps.action: Open the task in reviewer workbench and inspect available workflow actions
steps.expected: Workbench opens without losing task context and exposes workflow action path
steps.observed: Workbench opened with hydrated task context and both forward/return dialog entry points.

evidence.consoleErrors: App remained usable despite frontend-version warning and WebGL2 viewer failure in this environment.
evidence.network: Workbench hydration triggered review-record and history GET requests for task-af46d596-d792-40f8-976d-bc052fb3822b.

frictions.description: The 3D viewer fails in this environment with '需要 WebGL2（canvas.getContext("webgl2") 失败）', so validation had to rely on panel/task UI rather than rendered model context.
frictions.resolution: Continued validating reviewer inbox/workbench dialogs and task metadata from the surrounding UI.

frictions.description: Browser console consistently warned 'Failed to load frontend version' because a JSON fetch returned HTML.
frictions.resolution: Noted as ambient console noise and continued when it did not block the reviewer path.

frictions.description: The seeded task id task-af46d596-d792-40f8-976d-bc052fb3822b was not discoverable by inbox search even though one reviewer-visible task existed.
frictions.resolution: Validated the visible live task instead and recorded the mismatch as an observation.

blockers.description: Shared live environment made it unsafe to confirm post-mutation assertions by actually submitting or returning the reviewer task.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Opened the standard submit/return dialogs and validated non-mutating UI gating only; intentionally did not confirm either action.

blockers.description: No reviewer-targeted embedded landing URL/context was provided, so embedded handoff entry could not be exercised.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked the live URL and app entry path; only generic root entry through project card was available.

blockers.description: The reviewer UI does not expose raw assignment-field lineage, so legacy reviewerId compatibility could not be distinguished from normal checkerId mapping by browser observation alone.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Inspected visible task metadata and search behavior, but no field-level assignment provenance was surfaced.

summary: Tested 12 assigned assertions through the live reviewer UI: 6 passed, 2 failed, and 4 were blocked. Failures were concentrated around missing visible workflow history after task hydration; blocked items required unsafe shared-state mutation or unavailable embedded entry context.
